name: TRPG Runtime V2
description: Structured TRPG world-store tools for OpenClaw sessions (V2).

worldRoot.description: Optional absolute or resolvable path to world root. Defaults to extension-local world directory.

allowPatchApply.description: When false, trpg_patch_apply always denies writes.

allowedAgentIds.description: Only these agent ids may execute tools. Empty array allows all agents.

worldRoot.label: World Root
worldRoot.help: Use only when workspace-based auto-resolution is not desired.

allowPatchApply.label: Allow Patch Apply
allowPatchApply.help: Keep disabled unless you intentionally allow writes from trpg_patch_apply.

allowedAgentIds.label: Allowed Agent IDs
allowedAgentIds.help: Restrict tool execution to dedicated agents. Leave empty to allow all agents.
